creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
I can confirm that this patch works fine.
But today the port got updated (rev. 557447), and this patch unfortunately does not:
[...]
In file included from ServiceUnixAccountHandler.cpp:20:
In file included from ./ServiceUnixAccountHandler.h:23:
./../../../backends/service/xp/ServiceAccountHandler.h:152:28: error: no member
      named 'error' in namespace 'asio::placeholders'

     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^
./../../../backends/service/xp/ServiceAccountHandler.h:152:55: error: no member
      named 'bytes_transferred' in namespace 'asio::placeholders'
  ...asio::placeholders::error, asio::placeholders::bytes_transferred, recipi...
                                ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^
2 warnings and 2 errors generated.
